,(SELECT SUM(d.RKJE_NO) FROM T_JS_CLJSD_CB d WHERE d.ZBID=a.id) 'ZBHSJE', (SELECT SUM(d.RKSE) FROM T_JS_CLJSD_CB d WHERE d.ZBID=a.id) 'ZSE', (SELECT SUM(d.RKJE) FROM T_JS_CLJSD_CB d WHERE d.ZBID=a.id) 'ZHSJE', CASE WHEN (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(FK.f_FKJE),0) FROM (SELECT fka.f_FKJE,fkb.GLYWID FROM T_FK_Supplier fka INNER JOIN T_FK_Supplier_CB fkb ON fka.id=fkb.T_FK_Supplier_ID WHERE fka.DJZT='2') FK WHERE FK.GLYWID=a.Id)=0 THEN '未付款'WHEN (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(FK.f_FKJE),0) FROM (SELECT fka.f_FKJE,fkb.GLYWID FROM T_FK_Supplier fka INNER JOIN T_FK_Supplier_CB fkb ON fka.id=fkb.T_FK_Supplier_ID WHERE fka.DJZT='2') FK WHERE FK.GLYWID=a.Id)>=ISNULL(a.ZJE,0) THEN '已付款' WHEN (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(FK.f_FKJE),0) FROM (SELECT fka.f_FKJE,fkb.GLYWID FROM T_FK_Supplier fka INNER JOIN T_FK_Supplier_CB fkb ON fka.id=fkb.T_FK_Supplier_ID WHERE fka.DJZT='2') FK WHERE FK.GLYWID=a.Id)<ISNULL(a.ZJE,0) THEN '部分付款' END 'FKZT', (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(FK.f_FKJE),0) FROM (SELECT fka.f_FKJE,fkb.GLYWID FROM T_FK_Supplier fka INNER JOIN T_FK_Supplier_CB fkb ON fka.id=fkb.T_FK_Supplier_ID WHERE fka.DJZT='2') FK WHERE FK.GLYWID=a.Id) 'YFKJE',((SELECT ISNULL(SUM(FK.f_FKJE),0) FROM (SELECT fka.f_FKJE,fkb.GLYWID FROM T_FK_Supplier fka INNER JOIN T_FK_Supplier_CB fkb ON fka.id=fkb.T_FK_Supplier_ID WHERE fka.DJZT='2') FK WHERE FK.GLYWID=a.Id)-ISNULL(a.ZJE,0)) 'WFKJE'
